name: Frozen Citrus Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the frozen concentrate in a large mixing bowl and beat for about 30 seconds.
2. Gradually spoon in the softened vanilla ice cream and blend.
3. Fold in the thawed whipped topping and add the yellow food coloring (if desired). Whip until smooth.
4. If necessary, freeze until the mixture will mound.
5. Spoon into the prepared pie crust.
6. Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours.
7. Store any leftover pie in the freezer.
